summary: Translation introduces sweetness
details: 好喝 means pleasant/good to drink; the English adds the narrower meaning 'sweet'.

summary: 电影 is translated as story
details: The Chinese says movie/film, while the English says story.

summary: Sentence needs a natural motion construction
details: 学生出房间了 is marked natural but should be reviewed against forms such as 从房间出来 or 离开房间.

summary: Sentence is semantically contradictory
details: Beer is a beverage, and placing it on a plate is an implausible default context.

summary: Coverage sentence is awkward
details: 一斤香蕉不少 and its literal English require a more natural context or replacement.

summary: 起 is incomplete in this context
details: 他从床上起 should be reviewed against the intended 起床/起来 construction.

summary: 收邮件 gloss is misleading
details: Please collect the email is not an idiomatic equivalent; intended receive/check/collect meaning is unclear.

summary: 火 inherits a compound gloss
details: The character 火 is glossed as train, apparently inherited from 火车.

summary: 果 inherits a compound gloss
details: The character 果 is glossed as apple, apparently inherited from 苹果.

summary: 道 inherits an unrelated word gloss
details: The character 道 is glossed as to know and requires sense-specific review.

summary: Q&A model answers lack utterance translations
details: All 180 migrated Q&A cards translate the question only; 360 positive/negative model answers need locale-keyed translations.

summary: Classifier 杯 uses an authorized point-scoped vocabulary exception
details: The HSK 1 grammar syllabus requires borrowed classifier 杯 while vocabulary.csv contains only noun 杯子. Explicit user authorization permits 杯 to remain unlinked only in reviewed grammar examples that demonstrate hsk26-g1-013 and mark the exact occurrence with target role classifier; it does not create or imply a 杯 vocab_id.
notes: Implemented as grammar_vocabulary_exceptions.csv policy evidence. Mapping 杯 to 杯子 remains forbidden.

summary: Negative adverb 不必 uses an authorized point-scoped vocabulary exception
details: The HSK 3 grammar syllabus requires a demonstrated 不必 function, while vocabulary.csv introduces standalone 不必 at HSK 4 and contains no HSK 1-3 sense that can support an exact relation. Repository-user editorial-exception authorization and the instruction to finalize permit the exact 不必 occurrence to remain unlinked only when it demonstrates hsk26-g3-023 with target role negative_modal; this does not create or relabel a vocabulary sense.
notes: Implemented as grammar_vocabulary_exceptions.csv policy evidence. Mapping the HSK 4 不必 sense into HSK 3 remains forbidden.

summary: Measure-word separator collapsed in extracted source
details: The extracted official source concatenates 句公斤; reviewed linguistic decomposition treats them as separate inventory members.
notes: The grammar_points.csv source cell remains unchanged; decomposition records 句 and 公斤 separately.

summary: Verb-complement phrase inherits a particle hierarchy
details: Blank source cells make the normalized row inherit Word classes > Particles > Basic structural types, while 动补短语1 denotes a phrase type.
notes: Preserve the source mirror and use an approved Phrases display-group override.

summary: Existential formula uses 所处 where a place expression is intended
details: The official Chinese prints 所处+是+名词; aligned English and the construction support 处所 + 是 + 名词.
notes: Keep the official cell literal and record the project-authored pedagogical normalization.

summary: Two distinct adverb classes share one English source label
details: 情态副词 and 语气副词 are both translated as Modal adverbs in the aligned source.
notes: Approved learner titles preserve the functional distinction.

summary: English meaning must not replace the Chinese grammar target
details: The aligned English cell says generally speaking while the normative target is 一般来说.
notes: The learner target remains 一般来说.

summary: Progressive complex sentence label can imply progressive aspect
details: 递进复句 describes additive escalation, not an action in progress.
notes: Learner copy uses additive escalation with 不但……而且…….

summary: Grammar HSK 2 lists 常 before its HSK 3 vocabulary entry
details: The official HSK 2 grammar inventory lists 常 and 经常, while vocabulary.csv introduces standalone 常 at HSK 3.
notes: Retain 常 in normalized reviewed grammar content; HSK 2 examples demonstrate 经常 and create no 常 vocabulary relation.

summary: Grammar HSK 3 lists 盘 before its HSK 6 vocabulary entry
details: The official HSK 3 grammar inventory lists borrowed classifiers 碗 and 盘, while vocabulary.csv introduces standalone 盘 at HSK 6.
notes: Retain 盘 in normalized reviewed grammar content; HSK 3 examples demonstrate 碗 and create no 盘 vocabulary relation.
